contributions.title: Gateway: require auth on all plugin HTTP routes

note.author: steipete
note.text:
Landed manually on main as part of the gateway access/auth/config migration cluster.

Included commits:
- 53d10f868 (fix(gateway): land access/auth/config migration cluster)
- 1c8ae978d (test(lobster): preserve execFile in child_process mock) (gate-stability follow-up)

Validation run before landing:
- pnpm lint
- pnpm build
- pnpm test

Thanks again @Mariana-Codebase for #29198.

contributions.title: fix(ui): prevent tabnabbing in chat images
